title: bupleurum divaricatum f. vulgare
intro: Bupleurum divaricatum f. vulgare, also known as a variant of the Chinese Thorowax or Chinese Maythorn, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum divaricatum f. vulgare include reducing fever, relieving stress and anxiety, and aiding in the treatment of various respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. In traditional Chinese medicine, this plant is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or tea, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
